name: Instrument Effects in Language-Model Honesty Evaluation: An Auditable Single-System Demonstration
summary: arXiv:2607.14399v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Evaluations of language-model honesty read the model's verdicts as evidence about the model. We test the instrument instead. We built a text-adventur...
description: arXiv:2607.14399v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Evaluations of language-model honesty read the model's verdicts as evidence about the model. We test the instrument instead. We built a text-adventure world where the game engine, not any model, knows whether the quest can be completed. A language model plays under a budget and must eventually declare its quest complete, unreachable, or not yet de...
author: Justin Bronder (Corabo Inc.)
